insert_execute_log: INSERT INTO execution_log (execution_grp_id, schedule_id, detail_id, start_time, end_time, result_code, result_message, environment_info) VALUES (UNHEX(REPLACE(%s, '-', '')), %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
get_device: SELECT device_id, device_name, status FROM devices WHERE device_name = %s
update_device: UPDATE devices SET last_login_at = NOW(), version = %s WHERE device_name = %s
update_schedule_group_status: UPDATE schedule_group SET status = %s WHERE schedule_id = %s
update_schedule_detail_status: UPDATE schedule_detail SET status = %s WHERE schedule_id = %s AND detail_id = %s
update_manual_execution_status: UPDATE manual_execution SET status = %s, modifier = 'timeweaver-agent', modified_at = NOW() WHERE manual_id = %s
update_manual_execution_group_status: UPDATE manual_execution me JOIN schedule_detail sd ON sd.detail_id = me.detail_id SET me.status = %s, modifier = 'timeweaver-agent', modified_at = NOW() WHERE sd.schedule_id = %s
